_superseded.reason: This file is a self-described 'partial'/'unverified' AI-reconstructed extraction of Cunnekt's Postman docs (see its own 'status'/'reason'/'unverifiedFields' fields below). Its one concrete claim — POST {base}/whatsapp/sendtemplate — is WRONG and directly contradicted by real Postman documentation the project owner copy-pasted verbatim from Cunnekt's own docs site, which confirms the actual endpoint is POST {CUNNEKT_BASE_URL}/sendnotification (see backend/src/services/communication/providers/whatsapp.provider.ts class doc comment for the confirmed shape, including template variables and media headers).
_superseded.doNotUse: Do not use this file as a source of truth for the Cunnekt API. It is kept only for historical reference of what was tried before real documentation was obtained.

name: Cunnekt API - verified public extraction
reason: The supplied Postman documentation is JavaScript-rendered and did not expose the full machine-readable collection through the public document fetch. Only endpoints and fields directly visible in indexed official Postman/Cunnekt pages are included.
